title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: Project Lightwell is IBM and Red Hat's $5 billion initiative to secure the open source ecosystem using AI-augmented engineers and a trusted security clearinghouse. The project aims to protect the over 90% of Fortune 500 companies that rely on open source software from emerging cyberattacks.
